subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call! By God, this is the Call whereby the atoms of dust were stirred through the breaths of thy Lord's revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء تالله هذا ندآء به تحرکت ذرات التراب بما اخذتها نفحات وحی ربک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
